title: En Urimai Jallikattu Song Lyrics ADK SriRascol
stanzas:
En Urimai Jallikattu Song Lyrics ADK SriRascol
#EnUrimaiJallikattu

Vaada vaada mallukattu da
vaada vaada ninnu vellu da
Vaada vaada namma ooru da
Vaada vaada modhi paarudaa(2)

thala thookka vidudaa
naanga thaanda RAJA
inga meiyura kaala
enga veettu pulla daa

pillaiyodu vilaiyaada
veyir eriyuthu unakkaadaa
saguni podum aattam pottu
yaara odhaikkura daa

pirandha boomi idhu
valarntha mannu idhu
varattu kaattuk kulla
poraadum ullam idhu

ennatha senjuputtom
aruvadai mattum michcham
adharku pichchai kettom
thalaikku thanjam vandhom
ennatha pannivittom
indha vaattu vaattura

veeramagan naanga
vilaiyadurom
vilaiyatta edhukku
vela pesura pesura
pesura!!
ithukku mela nee pesura
kaluthai ethuku nerikkura
kalaacharathai yedhuku
odaikkura
manithaa

ilaignargal onnaa vanthaa
enna nadakkum theriyumaa ?
idhu enga urimai da
vittukudukka maattom da

jalli jalli
jalli kattu kaalai (3)
enga veettu pulla
idhu jalli kattu kaalai

jallikattu vilaiyadu mallukatti
thadaigalai indru udaithu vittu
Tamilnadu erangi kuththu.
meesaiya murukku tamizha
erangi nee vettaiyaadu

nadaimurai ini
vidhigalai thadaigalai
udaithidu mithithidu
Tamil Nadu adaiyalathai
.. tamizha

veera vilaiyaattu jallikattu
TamilNadu erangi ne poradu
poraadida vilaiyaadida
purapadu Tamizha

thala thookka vidudaa
naanga thaanda RAJA
inga meiyura kaala
enga veettu pulla daa

pillaiyodu vilaiyaada
veyir eriyuthu unakkaadaa
saguni podum aattam pottu
yaara odhaikkura daa

jalli jalli
jalli kattu kaalai (3)
enga veettu pulla
idhu jalli kattu kaalai

Tamizha..
jalli kattu kaalai (2)
enga veettu pulla
idhu jalli kattu kaalai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song En Urimai Jallikattu?

The song celebrates the spirit of local culture and community, emphasizing joy and togetherness.

In which movie is the song featured?

The movie for En Urimai Jallikattu is currently unknown.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Dinesh Kanakaratnam and Sri Raskol.

When was En Urimai Jallikattu released?

The song was released on January 27, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song En Urimai Jallikattu is a lively and energetic anthem that reflects the joy of community and celebration. With its catchy lyrics and upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. The collaboration between Dinesh Kanakaratnam and Sri Raskol brings a unique flavor to the track, making it perfect for festive occasions. The song conveys a sense of pride and togetherness, resonating with listeners who enjoy vibrant music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Urimai Jallikattu is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the unique collaboration between Dinesh Kanakaratnam and Sri Raskol. This song captures the spirit of celebration and fun, making it a perfect addition to any party playlist. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it promises to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, let's gather together, come, come, you shine, come, come, our village, come, come, look at the beauty.
Let go of the head, we are the kings here, the boys of our house are strong.
Playing with the child, the fire is burning, is it for you? The game is set, who are you chasing?
This land where we were born, this soil that has grown, this heart will fight within the boundaries.
We have taken what we need, only the weapons remain, we have come with pride, we have taken care of this village.
We are brave, we will play, what is the need for work? Speak, speak, speak! Why do you speak harshly? Why do you insult our culture?
Are we a herd of animals? Are we a group of fools?
If the youth come together, do you know what will happen? This is our right, we will not give it up.
Jallikattu, Jallikattu, Jallikattu, this is the Jallikattu of our house.
Jallikattu is played, the obstacles are broken today, Tamil Nadu rises with a dance. With a mustache, Tamil rises, you will hunt.
The path of progress will break the obstacles, Tamil Nadu will rise, oh Tamil.
Brave play, Jallikattu, Tamil Nadu rises, you will fight, play, and march, oh Tamil.
Rise up, take your rights, come, come, come.
Your voice is my voice, it will resonate throughout the world.
Let go of the head, we are the kings here, the boys of our house are strong.
Playing with the child, the fire is burning, is it for you? The game is set, who are you chasing?
Jallikattu, Jallikattu, Jallikattu, this is the Jallikattu of our house.
Tamil, Jallikattu, this is the Jallikattu of our house.
